Sender: G. Daressy, Acting Director General of the Antiquities Service
Recipient: Monsieur E. Baraize, Directeur de Travaux du Service des Antiquités, à Abydos, par Baliana
Brief_Summary: This letter from the Antiquities Service requests Mr. E. Baraize to specify the additional sum he requires for his work at Abydos, in response to his previous letter regarding the project.
English_Translation:
ANTIQUITIES SERVICE,
GENERAL DIRECTORATE.
Nº 22.20/17
Attached documents
R.D.

(MODEL Nº 37 — ٣٧ أورنيك نمرة)

Cairo, January 9, 1923

SUBJECT.- Abydos Works.

Sir,
In response to your letter of January 3rd instant,
Nº239, I have the honor to ask you to kindly
let me know what additional sum you
wish to obtain for your work at Abydos.

Please accept, Sir, the assurance of my distinguished
consideration.

FOR THE DIRECTOR GENERAL,
[Signature: G. Daressy]

[Stamp: CAIRO -9 JA 233452 (upside down)]
[Stamp: EGYPTIAN GOVERNMENT. الحكومة المصرية]
[Stamp: MINISTRY OF PUBLIC WORKS وزارة الأشغال العمومية]
[Stamp: EGYPT GOVERNMENT الحكومة المصرية]

Mr. E. Baraize,
Director of Works of the
Antiquities Service,
at Abydos, via Baliana

[Pencil note: 2]
[Pencil note: B]
[Pencil note: 211]
Stamps_and_Annotations: Pencil note: 191 (part of date, corrected to 1923)
Stamp: MINISTERE DES TRAVAUX PUBLICS وزارة الأشغال العمومية
Confidence_Notes: The signature 'G. Daray' is interpreted as G. Daressy, a known figure in the Egyptian Antiquities Service. The pencil note '191' next to the year '1923' is assumed to be an incomplete or initial thought for the year, with '1923' being the final correct year.
Full_Transcription:
SERVICE DES ANTIQUITÉS,
DIRECTION GÉNÉRALE.
Nº 22.20/17
Pièces jointes
R.D.

(MODÈLE Nº 37 — ٣٧ أورنيك نمرة)

Le Caire, le 9 Janv. [Pencil note: 191] 1923

OBJET.- Travaux d'Abydos.

Monsieur,
En réponse à votre lettre du 3 Janvier courant,
Nº239, j'ai l'honneur de vous prier de vouloir bien
me faire savoir quelle somme supplémentaire vous
désirez obtenir pour vos travaux d' Abydos.

Veuillez agréer, Monsieur, l'assurance de ma con-
sidération distinguée.

P. LE DIRECTEUR GENERAL,
[Signature: G. Daray]

[Stamp: CAIRO -9 JA 233452 (upside down)]
[Stamp: EGYPTIAN GOVERNMENT. الحكومة المصرية] [Pencil note: ١٢٢]
[Stamp: MINISTERE DES TRAVAUX PUBLICS وزارة الأشغال العمومية]
[Stamp: EGYPT GOVERNMENT الحكومة المصرية]

Monsieur E. Baraize,
Directeur de Travaux du
Sce des Antiquités,
à Abydos, par Baliana

[Pencil note: 2]
[Pencil note: B]
[Pencil note: 211]
